case_title: NICHOLAS REED SCRIBNER VS. JOSHUA JAMIL TEAL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2020 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JOSHUA JAMIL TEAL ON FEB-28-2020 - DENIED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS REED SCRIBNER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSHUA JAMIL TEAL. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE MATTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2020 - CONTINUED TO SEP-16-2020 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 ON COURT MOTION.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER. (SEE SCNANED DOCUMENT

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT TEAL, JOSHUA JAMIL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SCRIBNER, NICHOLAS REED TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT TEAL, JOSHUA JAMIL NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCRIBNER, NICHOLAS REED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEAL, JOSHUA JAMIL $7,657.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,792.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2020 BY WILLIAM LYNN. PLANTIFF STIPULATES TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS REED SCRIBNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSHUA JAMIL TEAL IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVEIWED IN OPEN COURT AND RETURNED. JUDGE PRO TEM. WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL (FROM DENIAL OF MOTION TO VACATE) FILED BY DEFENDANT TEAL, JOSHUA JAMIL MAILED TO RESPONDENT SCRIBNER, NICHOLAS REED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00 - SERVED NOV-27-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TEAL, JOSHUA JAMIL
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TEAL, JOSHUA JAMIL HEARING SET FOR FEB-28-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY SCRIBNER, NICHOLAS REED TEAL, JOSHUA JAMIL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUL-23-2020 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,633.00 FILED BY SCRIBNER, NICHOLAS REED AS TO DEFENDANT TEAL, JOSHUA JAMIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-16-2020 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2020 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. JOSHUA JAMIL TEAL DOES NOT OWE NICHOLAS SCRIBNER ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JAN-17-2020. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER SEE ATTACHED DOC. FILED BY TEAL, JOSHUA JAMIL
